sn18.4:1.1: … "What do you think, Rahula, is eye-contact … ear-contact … nose-contact … tongue-contact … body-contact … mind-contact permanent or impermanent?" –"Impermanent, venerable sir." …
sn18.4:1.2: "Seeing thus, Rahula, the instructed noble disciple experiences revulsion towards eye-contact … revulsion towards mind-contact. Experiencing revulsion, he becomes dispassionate … .sn.ii.247He understands: ‘… there is no more for this state of being.’"
